Meta.title.context: Browser-tab / PWA title. “Numbers” stays verbatim. “CFCC” is the ENGLISH abbreviation only — Chinese uses the church's Chinese name, 中华归主海沃教会 / 中華歸主海沃教會 (see GLOSSARY).

Meta.description.source: Snap church receipts now, submit reimbursement claims later.
Meta.description.context: Meta description shown in link previews and the PWA install sheet.

Meta.appName.context: iOS home-screen name. Always “Numbers” — never translated.

Common.status.draft.context: Status pill: claim not yet generated, still editable. Pairs with 'Generated'. One word.

Common.status.generated.context: Status pill: PDF has been generated, rows frozen. Pairs with 'Draft'. Keep short.

Common.status.needsReview.context: Status pill on the claims list for drafts awaiting verification.

Common.status.processed.context: Lowercase on purpose — appended mid-sentence to the receipt card's date · size line. Review.revertConfirm quotes this wording (test-enforced).

Common.cancel.context: Secondary dialog button: close without saving. One word.

Common.save.context: Primary button that commits a form or dialog. One word.

Common.saving.context: Save button label while the request is in flight. Keep the trailing ellipsis.

Common.loading.context: Placeholder text shown while a page's data loads.

Common.language.context: Label for the language selectors (NavBar switcher aria + profile field).

NavBar.shoebox.context: Top-navigation link. Auto-copied from Shoebox.title — translate that key.

NavBar.claims.context: Top-navigation link. Auto-copied from Claims.title — translate that key.

NavBar.profile.context: Top-navigation link. Auto-copied from Profile.title — translate that key.

NavBar.signOut.context: Nav button that ends the session. Keep short.

NavBar.signedInAs.context: Tooltip on the sign-out button; {name} is the user's display name.

Home.profileNudge.source: Your <link>profile</link> is missing a name or mailing address — both get printed on the reimbursement form.
Home.profileNudge.context: Warning banner on the home page; <link> wraps the word that opens the profile page.

SignIn.tagline.source: CFCC expense reimbursements — snap receipts now, file the claim later.
SignIn.tagline.context: One-liner under the app name on the sign-in card. English uses the CFCC abbreviation; Chinese uses the church's full Chinese name.

SignIn.failed.context: Generic sign-in failure; also the fallback when the server gives no better message.

SignIn.popupBlocked.source: Your browser blocked the sign-in popup. If you opened this from inside another app, tap the menu and choose “Open in Safari” (or Chrome), then try again.
SignIn.popupBlocked.context: Error when the browser blocks the Google sign-in popup; instructs escaping an in-app browser.

SignIn.embeddedTitle.context: Heading of the warning box shown inside in-app browsers (Messenger, Instagram…).

SignIn.embeddedBody.source: Google sign-in may not work in in-app browsers. If it doesn't, open this page in Safari or Chrome — tap the menu (⋯ or the share icon) and choose “Open in Safari”.
SignIn.embeddedBody.context: Body of that warning; ⋯ is the browser's menu glyph — keep it.

SignIn.googleSignIn.context: Primary sign-in button (Google logo precedes the text).

SignIn.googleTryAnyway.context: Same button while inside an in-app browser, where sign-in will likely fail.

SignIn.notConfigured.source: No sign-in method is configured. Set FIREBASE_API_KEY, FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN and FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID in the environment.
SignIn.notConfigured.context: Operator-facing notice; <code> wraps environment-variable names — never translate them.

SignIn.devLogin.context: Heading of the passwordless login form that only exists in test mode.

SignIn.devEmailPlaceholder.context: Example email placeholder; usually kept as-is.

SignIn.devNamePlaceholder.context: Placeholder of the dev-login name input.

SignIn.devSignIn.context: Submit button of the dev-login form; '(dev)' marks it as test-only.

Claims.title.context: Page title of the claims list. Canonical — the NavBar link auto-copies this value.

Claims.subtitle.source: Draft claims need review; generated claims are ready to print and sign.
Claims.subtitle.context: One-liner under the title explaining draft vs generated.

Claims.emptyTitle.context: Empty-state heading when the user has no claims yet.

Claims.emptyBody.source: Select receipts on the <link>Receipts</link> page and hit “New Claim”.
Claims.emptyBody.context: Empty-state body; <link> opens the Shoebox. Quotes the New Claim button — its exact current translation is provided as mustContain and must appear verbatim (test-enforced).

Claims.counts.source: {items} items · {receipts, plural, one {# receipt} other {# receipts}}
Claims.counts.context: Meta line per claim: {items} row count, {receipts} receipt count (ICU).

Profile.title.context: Page title. Canonical — the NavBar link auto-copies this value.

Profile.subtitle.source: Printed onto the “Name” and “Address” lines of the reimbursement form.
Profile.subtitle.context: Explains the fields are printed onto the official (English) PDF form; the quoted words are that form's lines.

Profile.fullName.context: Field label for the name printed on the reimbursement check.

Profile.fullNamePlaceholder.context: Example person name — use a natural name for the locale.

Profile.mailingAddress.context: Field label for the check-mailing address.

Profile.mailingAddressPlaceholder.context: Example US postal address; typically kept as-is.

Profile.saved.context: Inline confirmation next to Save; keep the ✓.

Profile.loadFailed.context: Error when the profile fetch fails.

Profile.saveFailed.context: Fallback error when saving fails without a server message.

ReceiptGrid.pdfChip.context: Tiny chip on a card when a PDF thumbnail can't render; 'PDF' acronym stays.

ReceiptGrid.pdfThumbAlt.context: Alt text (screen readers) of a PDF receipt's thumbnail image.

ReceiptGrid.deleteReceipt.context: aria-label of the ✕ delete button on a receipt card; {name} is the uploaded file name.

ReceiptGrid.viewLarger.context: aria-label of the expand button on a card; {name} is the file name.

ReceiptGrid.viewLargerTitle.context: Hover tooltip of that expand button. Keep short.

ReceiptGrid.notePlaceholder.context: Placeholder of the free-text description input on every receipt card.

ReceiptGrid.noteAria.context: aria-label of that description input; {name} is the file name.

ReceiptGrid.meta.context: Card meta line: upload date · file size. Keep the ' · ' separators and 'KB'.

ReceiptGrid.claimChip.context: Chip on a card linking to a GENERATED claim it belongs to; drafts use Common.status.draft instead. One word.

PdfPreview.chip.context: Fallback chip when an inline PDF preview fails; 'PDF' stays.

PdfPreview.rendering.context: Auto-copied from Viewer.rendering — translate that key.

PdfPreview.pageAlt.context: Alt text of each preview page image; {page} is the page number.

PdfPreview.omitted.source: +{omitted, plural, one {# more page not shown — open the PDF receipt to view it.} other {# more pages not shown — open the PDF receipt to view them.}}
PdfPreview.omitted.context: Truncation note under a long PDF's preview (ICU).

PdfPreview.open.context: Link under the preview to the original PDF; keep the ↗.

Shoebox.title.context: Title of the receipt-capture page ('Receipts'). Internally still called Shoebox (component, keys, testids). Canonical — the NavBar link auto-copies this value. NOTE: also the plain word for receipts, so location phrases quote it (“收据”页 / 「收據」頁).

Shoebox.intro.source: Drop receipts here as you go. Select some when you're ready to file a claim.

Shoebox.upload.context: Primary upload button; keep the 📷. Canonical — the add-receipts dialog auto-copies it.

Shoebox.uploading.context: Upload button while a file is in flight; keep the ellipsis. Canonical for the add-receipts dialog.

Shoebox.uploadFailed.context: Error when an upload fails. Canonical for the add-receipts dialog.

Shoebox.dropTitle.context: Heading of the full-screen drag-and-drop overlay.

Shoebox.dropBody.context: Subline of the drop overlay: accepted file kinds.

Shoebox.noteSaveFailed.context: Error when saving a card's description fails.

Shoebox.deleteConfirm.context: Native browser confirm() text before deleting a receipt.

Shoebox.deleteFailed.context: Error when deleting a receipt fails.

Shoebox.selectedCount.source: {count, plural, one {# receipt} other {# receipts}} selected
Shoebox.selectedCount.context: Sticky-bar label while receipts are selected (ICU count).

Shoebox.selectPrompt.source: Select receipts below to start a claim
Shoebox.selectPrompt.context: Sticky-bar label when nothing is selected yet.

Shoebox.newClaim.context: THE primary call-to-action; keep the ✨. Claims.emptyBody and Shoebox.step2 quote this wording (minus ✨) — changing it re-drafts them (test-enforced).

Shoebox.waitingRateLimit.context: New Claim button label while the AI provider is rate-limited.

Shoebox.readingShort.context: New Claim button label while extraction runs.

Shoebox.selectHint.context: Appears under the button after clicking with nothing selected; ↑ points at the receipt cards above — keep it.

Shoebox.readingInitial.context: Live status line when extraction starts (count not yet known). Canonical for the add-receipts dialog.

Shoebox.readingCount.source: Reading {total, plural, one {# receipt} other {# receipts}} with AI…
Shoebox.readingCount.context: Live status line once the receipt count is known (ICU). Canonical for the add-receipts dialog.

Shoebox.readProgress.context: Live progress line: {completed} of {total} receipts done. Canonical for the add-receipts dialog.

Shoebox.manualInstead.context: Escape-hatch button during a rate-limit wait: skip the AI, type rows by hand. Canonical for the add-receipts dialog.

Shoebox.manualSetup.context: Status line while the manual (no-AI) claim is being created.

Shoebox.manualStartFailed.context: Error when that manual claim can't be created.

Shoebox.generateEnded.context: Error when the progress stream ends without a result.

Shoebox.emptyTitle.context: Empty-state heading for a brand-new user (no receipts uploaded yet).

Shoebox.emptyBody.source: Upload a photo or PDF of a receipt to get started.
Shoebox.emptyBody.context: Empty-state subline inviting the first upload.

Shoebox.step1.source: <step>1. Snap.</step> Photograph receipts the moment you buy.
Shoebox.step1.context: Onboarding step 1 of 4; <step> wraps the numbered lead word — keep the 'N. Verb.' pattern.

Shoebox.step2.source: <step>2. Batch.</step> Later, when you're ready, select receipts and hit New Claim.
Shoebox.step2.context: Onboarding step 2; <step> wraps the numbered lead word. Quotes the New Claim button — its exact translation is provided as mustContain and must appear verbatim (test-enforced).

Shoebox.step3.source: <step>3. Verify.</step> Check every row against the receipt. Fix, split, or exclude items.
Shoebox.step3.context: Onboarding step 3: the human verification pass.

Shoebox.step4.source: <step>4. Print.</step> Download the filled CFCC form with receipts attached, sign, and drop it off.
Shoebox.step4.context: Onboarding step 4; 'the filled CFCC form' means the church's official reimbursement form — Chinese says 教会报销表 / 教會報銷表 rather than the English abbreviation.

Shoebox.processedSummary.context: Collapsible section heading for receipts already on generated claims; {count}.

Shoebox.processedNote.source: Already on a generated claim — still selectable if part of the purchase belongs on another claim.
Shoebox.processedNote.context: Fine print under that heading: processed receipts stay selectable.

Shoebox.prepareTitle.context: Heading of the per-photo dialog shown before anything uploads.

Shoebox.prepareLeft.context: Suffix after that heading when more files queue: (N left). Keep the parentheses.

Shoebox.prepareEditTitle.source: Rotate or crop this receipt photo
Shoebox.prepareEditTitle.context: Tooltip of the rotate/crop button. Canonical — the review screen auto-copies it.

Shoebox.prepareEditButton.context: Rotate/crop button label; keep the ✂. Canonical — the review screen and viewer buttons auto-copy it.

Shoebox.noteLabel.context: Label of the optional description input in the prepare dialog.

Shoebox.notePlaceholder.context: Example description; 'VBS' (Vacation Bible School) stays verbatim.

Shoebox.prepareHintLocal.source: Uploads when you save or skip. You can edit the description on the card later.
Shoebox.prepareHintLocal.context: Fine print for photos: nothing uploads until Save/Skip.

Shoebox.prepareHintUploaded.source: You can edit the description on the card later.
Shoebox.prepareHintUploaded.context: Fine print for PDFs (already uploaded when picked).

Shoebox.skipAll.context: Dialog button: upload ALL queued photos without descriptions. It skips the notes, not the uploads.

Shoebox.skip.context: Dialog button: upload THIS photo without a description. It skips the note, not the upload.

Shoebox.quotaRingAria.source: Retrying in about {seconds, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}}
Shoebox.quotaRingAria.context: aria-label of the countdown ring during a rate-limit wait (ICU seconds).

Viewer.ariaTitle.context: aria-label of the full-screen receipt viewer dialog; {name} is the file name.

Viewer.openNewTab.context: Tooltip + aria of the ↗ icon button.

Viewer.closeTitle.context: Tooltip of ✕; 'Esc' is the keyboard key name — keep it.

Viewer.previewUnavailable.source: Preview unavailable — use ↗ to open the PDF
Viewer.previewUnavailable.context: Empty state when a PDF preview fails; ↗ refers to the open-in-new-tab icon — keep it.

Viewer.rendering.context: Spinner text while the server rasterizes a PDF. Canonical — the inline PDF preview auto-copies it.

Viewer.pageAlt.context: Alt text of each rendered PDF page; {name} file name, {page} number.

Viewer.omitted.source: +{omitted, plural, one {# more page not shown — use ↗ to open the full PDF.} other {# more pages not shown — use ↗ to open the full PDF.}}
Viewer.omitted.context: Note when a long PDF is truncated (ICU); ↗ refers to the icon — keep it.

Viewer.editTitle.context: Tooltip of that button. Keep short.

Viewer.editButton.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.prepareEditButton — translate that key.

Viewer.zoomOut.context: Tooltip + aria of the − zoom button.

Viewer.zoomIn.context: Tooltip + aria of the + zoom button.

Viewer.resetZoom.context: Tooltip + aria of the reset-zoom button.

Viewer.zoomLevel.context: Zoom badge between the buttons; {percent} is a number — keep the %.

ManualEntry.title.context: Dialog heading when the AI could not read a receipt and the user types it in.

ManualEntry.intro.source: The AI couldn't read {name}. Type in what's printed on it so the row can be verified.
ManualEntry.intro.context: Dialog intro; <strong> wraps {name}, the receipt's file name.

ManualEntry.openPdf.context: Fallback link when the browser can't embed the PDF.

ManualEntry.merchant.context: Field label: store/vendor name as printed on the receipt. One word.

ManualEntry.merchantPlaceholder.context: Example merchant; a recognizable real store name works best.

ManualEntry.purchaseDate.context: Field label for the date printed on the receipt.

ManualEntry.optional.context: Grey suffix after a field label; keep the parentheses.

ManualEntry.printedTotal.context: Field label; ($) = amount entered in dollars — keep the $.

ManualEntry.refunded.context: Field label for the refunded amount; keep the ($).

ManualEntry.amountPlaceholder.context: Numeric placeholder for money inputs; usually kept as 0.00.

ManualEntry.summary.context: Field label for the short list of items bought.

ManualEntry.summaryPlaceholder.source: e.g. Paper towels, snack variety pack, folding table

ManualEntry.rowAmount.context: Computed net line under the fields; <strong> wraps {amount}, a pre-formatted $ value.

ManualEntry.totalMinusRefunded.context: Parenthetical appended to rowAmount only when a refund exists. Keep the LEADING SPACE and the − sign.

ManualEntry.later.context: Secondary button: close the dialog and fill the row in later.

ImageEditor.title.context: Dialog heading of the rotate/crop tool.

ImageEditor.introRestoring.source: Showing the originally uploaded image. Save to keep it, or Cancel to leave the current one.
ImageEditor.introRestoring.context: Intro while previewing the original image restore.

ImageEditor.introLocal.source: Straighten the photo and drag the box to trim away the background. The edit happens on this device before anything uploads.
ImageEditor.introLocal.context: Intro in the pre-upload flow: the edit happens on-device.

ImageEditor.introStored.source: Straighten the photo and drag the box to trim away the background. Saving replaces the stored image.
ImageEditor.introStored.context: Intro when editing an already-uploaded photo.

ImageEditor.reset.context: Button clearing the pending edit / staging the original. One word.

ImageEditor.resetTitle.source: Reset to the originally uploaded image

ImageEditor.editedAlt.context: Alt text of the photo being edited.

ImageEditor.loadFailed.source: Could not load the receipt image
ImageEditor.loadFailed.context: Error when the image can't be loaded into the editor.

ImageEditor.editFailed.context: Fallback error when saving the edit fails.

ImageEditor.saveDisabledTitle.source: Rotate or draw a crop first
ImageEditor.saveDisabledTitle.context: Tooltip on the disabled Save button before any change was made.

Review.loadFailed.context: Error when the claim fetch fails.

Review.backToClaims.context: Link inside that error banner, back to the claims list.

Review.updateFailed.context: Generic fallback when a row/claim edit fails.

Review.mergeFailed.context: Fallback when merging split rows fails.

Review.title.context: Page heading; the Draft/Generated status pill renders right after it.

Review.instruction.source: Check each amount against what you actually paid, pick a ministry, then check it off.
Review.instruction.context: One-liner under the heading describing the verification job.

Review.receiptHeader.context: Per-receipt group header; {index} is 1-based, {label} is 'Merchant — date' or a file name.

Review.headerNote.context: Suffix after the header showing the user's note; keep the '· ' separator.

Review.removeDisabledTitle.source: This is the only receipt — discard the claim instead
Review.removeDisabledTitle.context: Tooltip of the disabled Remove button when it's the claim's only receipt.

Review.removeTitle.source: Remove receipt from claim (back to the Receipts page)
Review.removeTitle.context: Tooltip of the enabled Remove button; the receipt goes back to the Receipts page.

Review.removeButton.context: Button removing a receipt from the claim; keep the ✕. Keep short.

Review.derivation.context: Banner explaining the AI's net amount; all three {args} are pre-formatted $ values. Keep the − and → symbols.

Review.editPhotoTitle.source: Rotate or crop this receipt photo
Review.editPhotoTitle.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.prepareEditTitle — translate that key.

Review.editPhotoButton.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.prepareEditButton — translate that key.

Review.receiptNote.context: Note line above a single-receipt claim's rows; <strong> wraps {note}, the user's own text.

Review.aiFailed.source: ⚠ The AI couldn't read this receipt.
Review.aiFailed.context: Warning banner when extraction failed for this receipt; keep the ⚠.

Review.enterDetails.context: Button in that banner opening the manual-entry dialog. Keep short.

Review.subtotal.context: Label before the per-receipt subtotal amount; keep the trailing colon.

Review.claimTotal.context: Label of the claim's grand-total row.

Review.verifiedProgress.context: Progress text next to the bar; keep the '{verified} / {total}' shape.

Review.generatedFrozen.context: Status line replacing the progress bar once the claim is generated.

Review.addReceipts.context: Action-bar button opening the add-receipts dialog; keep the full-width ＋.

Review.discard.context: Action-bar button that deletes the draft claim; keep it to one or two words.

Review.revert.context: Action-bar button on generated claims: back to editable draft. Keep the ↩.

Review.chooseMinistryFirst.context: Tooltip on the disabled verify button AND the gated PDF button.

Review.buildingPdf.context: PDF button label while generating. Keep the ellipsis.

Review.generatePdf.context: PDF button on drafts; keep the ⬇.

Review.downloadAgain.context: PDF button on generated claims (re-download); keep the ⬇.

Review.revertConfirm.source: Revert this claim to draft? Only do this if you have NOT filed the printed form yet. Rows become editable again and the receipts leave “processed”.
Review.revertConfirm.context: Native confirm() before reverting. Quotes the 'processed' status word — its exact translation is provided as mustContain and must appear verbatim (test-enforced).

Review.removeConfirm.source: Remove this receipt from the claim? Its rows are deleted and the receipt goes back to the Receipts page.
Review.removeConfirm.context: Native confirm() before removing a receipt from the claim; mentions the Receipts page by name — match Shoebox.title's wording.

Review.discardConfirm.source: Discard this draft claim? Receipts go back to the Receipts page.
Review.discardConfirm.context: Native confirm() before deleting the draft claim; mentions the Receipts page by name — match Shoebox.title's wording.

Review.deleteFailed.context: Error when deleting the claim fails.

Review.pdfFailed.context: Fallback error when PDF generation fails.

Review.suggestionFailed.context: Fallback error when the AI suggestion call fails.

Review.fanOutSet.source: Set {label} on {count, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}}
Review.fanOutSet.context: Undo-toast after a claim-wide ministry change; {label} is Review.quotedValue or Review.noMinistry; ICU row count.

Review.quotedValue.context: Quote wrapper for a ministry name inside fanOutSet; use the script's quote marks (“” / 「」).

Review.noMinistry.context: Slots into fanOutSet's {label} when the ministry was cleared. Lowercase fragment, not a sentence.

Review.undo.context: Button on the fan-out toast and suggestion banner. One word.

Review.dismissAria.context: aria-label of the ✕ on the toast.

Review.splitModeTitle.context: Dialog heading when Split is pressed on a single-ministry claim.

Review.splitModeBody.source: Splitting divides one receipt between different ministries, but this claim is set to use one ministry for every row.
Review.splitModeBody.context: Dialog body; <strong> emphasizes the one-ministry setting.

Review.splitModeBody2.source: Switch the claim to multiple ministries to split this row.
Review.splitModeBody2.context: Second paragraph: switching to multi-ministry enables the split.

Review.switchAndSplit.context: Primary button of that dialog: flip the mode, then open the split dialog.

Review.modeSwitchTitle.source: Use one ministry for the whole claim?
Review.modeSwitchTitle.context: Dialog heading when switching a multi-ministry claim to one ministry.

Review.modeSwitchBody.source: Every row will be set to {value} (what most rows already use{distinct, plural, =1 {} other {, of the # different ministries currently picked}}).
Review.modeSwitchBody.context: Dialog body; <strong>{value} is the adopted ministry. The ICU '=1' branch is DELIBERATELY EMPTY — the clause about N different ministries only appears when more than one is picked.

Review.modeSwitchBodyNoMinistry.source: Rows keep no ministry until you pick one at the top.
Review.modeSwitchBodyNoMinistry.context: Variant of that body when no row has a ministry yet.

Review.modeSwitchUnverify.source: {count, plural, one {# verified row} other {# verified rows}} will need re-verifying.
Review.modeSwitchUnverify.context: Amber warning inside that dialog: verified rows lose their check (ICU).

Review.panelTitleSingle.context: Heading of the ministry panel in single-ministry mode.

Review.panelTitle.context: Heading of the same panel in multi mode.

Review.modeOne.context: Left segment of the mode toggle; keep short. Review.multiHint quotes this wording (test-enforced).

Review.modeMultiple.context: Right segment of the mode toggle. One word if possible.

Review.descPlaceholder.source: What’s this claim for? e.g. “snacks for the youth retreat”
Review.descPlaceholder.context: Placeholder of the claim-description input; keep the quoted example phrasing.

Review.suggestTitle.source: Let the AI suggest a ministry & event from your description — you still apply it
Review.suggestTitle.context: Tooltip of the Suggest button: the AI proposes, the human applies.

Review.thinking.context: Suggest button label while the AI call runs. Keep the ellipsis.

Review.suggest.context: The AI-suggestion button; keep the ✨. Keep short.

Review.suggestionApplied.context: Suggestion-banner prefix after applying; <strong>{value} is the ministry — event.

Review.suggestionSuggested.context: Suggestion-banner prefix before applying; <strong>{value} as above.

Review.applyAllRows.context: Banner button on multi-receipt claims: mirror the suggestion onto every row.

Review.apply.context: Same button on single-receipt claims. One word.

Review.dismiss.context: Banner link that discards the suggestion. One word.

Review.noConfidentMatch.source: No confident match — pick a ministry below.
Review.noConfidentMatch.context: Banner when the AI declines to pick from the chart of accounts.

Review.pickMinistry.context: Empty first <option> of every ministry select; keep the '— … —' dash style.

Review.otherOption.context: Last <option>, opening a free-text ministry input; keep the ellipsis.

Review.claimMinistryAria.context: aria-label of the CLAIM-level ministry select. MUST stay distinct from Review.ministryAria (row-level) — tests and screen readers rely on it.

Review.customClaimMinistryAria.context: aria-label of the claim-level free-text ministry input; keep distinct from Review.customMinistryAria.

Review.eventPlaceholder.context: Placeholder of the event inputs; keep the (optional) suffix. An event example: a retreat, VBS.

Review.claimEventAria.context: aria-label of the claim-level event input; keep distinct from Review.eventAria.

Review.appliedEveryRow.source: Applied to every row — you still confirm each amount below.
Review.appliedEveryRow.context: Fine print under the claim-level controls: values mirror to rows, amounts still need per-row confirmation.

Review.multiHint.source: Each row picks its own ministry below. Switch to “One ministry” to set them all at once.
Review.multiHint.context: Fine print in multi mode. Quotes the One-ministry toggle — its exact translation is provided as mustContain and must appear verbatim (test-enforced).

Review.rowDescPlaceholder.context: Placeholder of each row's description textarea.

Review.rowDescAria.context: aria-label of that textarea. One word.

Review.badgeTitle.source: Ministry applies claim-wide — set it at the top
Review.badgeTitle.context: Tooltip on a row's ministry badge in single mode: change it at the top.

Review.ministrySetAbove.context: Badge text when the row has no ministry yet; ↑ points at the panel above — keep it.

Review.ministryAria.context: aria-label of the ROW-level ministry select. MUST stay distinct from Review.claimMinistryAria. One word.

Review.customMinistryAria.context: aria-label of the row-level free-text ministry input.

Review.eventAria.context: aria-label of the row-level event input. One word.

Review.amountAria.context: aria-label of the row's dollar-amount input; a literal $ sits before the box. One word.

Review.refundBadge.context: Tiny red badge on negative rows. English is uppercase for loudness; keep it very short.

Review.splitRowTitle.context: Tooltip of the Split button: divide one receipt between ministries.

Review.splitButton.context: Row action; keep the ⑂. Glossary: 拆分. Keep short.

Review.mergeBlockedTitle.source: Restore the excluded row before merging
Review.mergeBlockedTitle.context: Tooltip of Merge when the row above is excluded.

Review.mergeTitle.source: Merge back into the row above (undo split)
Review.mergeTitle.context: Tooltip of Merge: fold this split half back into the row above.

Review.mergeButton.context: Row action; keep the ⤴. Keep short.

Review.restoreTitle.context: Tooltip of the exclude button when the row is already excluded.

Review.excludeTitle.context: Tooltip of the exclude button: drop a personal / non-reimbursable item.

Review.restoreButton.context: Row action un-excluding an item; keep the ↩.

Review.excludeButton.context: Row action excluding an item; keep the 🗑.

Review.nudgeVerify.context: Pulsing hint pointing (→) at the confirm button when it's ready to click.

Review.nudgeSetAbove.source: Set the ministry at the top, then verify →
Review.nudgeSetAbove.context: Same hint on single-ministry claims when no ministry is set yet; keep the →.

Review.nudgePick.context: Same hint on multi-ministry claims; keep the →.

Review.verifyTitleVerified.context: Tooltip of the confirm button once verified (clicking undoes).

Review.verifyTitle.source: Click to certify that description, ministry, and amount are correct.
Review.verifyTitle.context: Tooltip of the confirm button: this click is the human attestation.

Review.looksCorrect.context: THE verification button on every row — 'I checked this against the receipt'. Keep short; a ✓ checkbox renders before it.

Review.splitTotal.context: Line showing the row's total; {amount} is a pre-formatted $ value.

Review.firstPart.context: Input label for the first half's amount; keep the ($).

Review.secondPart.context: Computed remainder line; <strong>{amount} is pre-formatted (or — while invalid).

Review.splitFailed.context: Fallback error when the split fails.

Review.splitConfirm.context: Primary button of the split dialog. One word; pairs with Review.splitButton.

Errors.notSignedIn.context: 401 body when the session is missing/expired.

Errors.idTokenRequired.context: 'idToken' is an API field name — keep it verbatim.

Errors.verifiedEmailRequired.source: A verified email address is required

Errors.emailRequired.context: Dev-login validation; lowercase 'email' mirrors the API field name.

Errors.notFound.context: Deliberately vague 404 — used where existence must not leak (capability URLs, cross-tenant). Keep it generic.

Errors.receiptOnClaim.source: Receipt is part of a claim and cannot be deleted

Errors.unsupportedFileType.context: {type} is a raw MIME string like image/heic — keep the placeholder as-is.

Errors.previewPdfOnly.source: Preview is only available for PDF receipts

Errors.imageEditImagesOnly.source: Only image receipts can be rotated or cropped

Errors.receiptFrozenByClaim.source: This receipt is on a generated claim — revert that claim before editing the image
Errors.receiptFrozenByClaim.context: 409 for image edits while a generated claim holds the receipt.

Errors.nothingToRestore.source: This receipt has no earlier version to restore

Errors.cropTooSmall.source: Crop region is too small to stay legible
Errors.cropTooSmall.context: Rejects a crop too small to stay legible.

Errors.claimFrozen.source: Claim already generated; line items are frozen
Errors.claimFrozen.context: 409 for row edits on a generated claim; 'frozen' = locked until reverted to draft.

Errors.ministryRequiredToVerify.source: Choose a ministry before verifying this row

Errors.splitAmountsInvalid.source: Split amounts must be non-zero and sum to the original amount

Errors.nothingToMergeInto.source: No row above from the same receipt to merge into

Errors.restoreBeforeMerge.source: Restore the excluded row before merging

Errors.claimSettingsFrozen.source: Claim already generated; review settings are frozen

Errors.onlyDraftDeletable.source: Only draft claims can be deleted

Errors.receiptsNotFound.source: One or more receipts were not found

Errors.claimReceiptsFrozen.source: Claim already generated; receipts are frozen

Errors.receiptsAlreadyOnClaim.source: One or more receipts are already on this claim

Errors.claimEmpty.source: Claim has no line items to reimburse

Errors.rowsUnverified.source: {count} row(s) still need verification before the PDF can be generated
Errors.rowsUnverified.context: PDF gate message; {count} rows lack verification. English 'row(s)' is a pseudo-plural — Chinese needs none.

Errors.rowsMissingMinistry.source: {count} row(s) still need a ministry before the PDF can be generated
Errors.rowsMissingMinistry.context: PDF gate message; {count} rows lack a ministry.

Errors.receiptNotOnClaim.source: Receipt not found in this claim

Errors.rowAlreadyEdited.source: This receipt's row has already been edited — adjust it directly

Errors.lastReceiptOnClaim.source: This is the only receipt in the claim — discard the claim instead

Errors.onlyGeneratedRevertible.source: Only generated claims can be reverted to draft

Errors.descriptionRequired.source: Describe the claim in a sentence first

Errors.aiRateLimited.source: The AI provider is rate-limited right now — try again in a minute or pick a ministry manually

Errors.aiNoSuggestion.source: The AI couldn't produce a suggestion — pick a ministry manually

Errors.aiQuotaExhausted.source: AI provider rate limit / quota exhausted (target {rpm} requests/minute). The server waited and retried but the quota hasn't cleared — please wait a minute and try again. Affected: {names}
Errors.aiQuotaExhausted.context: 429 after retries; {rpm} requests/minute target, {names} is a list of receipt file names.

Errors.quotaWait.source: Rate limit reached — waiting {seconds}s before retrying ({attempt}/{maxRetries})…
Errors.quotaWait.context: Live status during a rate-limit wait; {seconds} countdown, ({attempt}/{maxRetries}) retry counter — keep the shape.

AddReceipts.title.context: Dialog heading: add receipts to an existing draft claim.

AddReceipts.intro.source: Pick from your existing receipts or upload new ones — each is read with AI and gets its own row to verify.
AddReceipts.intro.context: Dialog subtitle: pick from receipts already uploaded, or upload new files.

AddReceipts.upload.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.upload — translate that key.

AddReceipts.uploading.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.uploading — translate that key.

AddReceipts.emptyTitle.context: Empty state when every uploaded receipt is already on this claim.

AddReceipts.emptyBody.source: Upload a photo or PDF of a receipt to add it.

AddReceipts.manualInstead.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.manualInstead — translate that key.

AddReceipts.addingManual.context: Status while adding rows without AI.

AddReceipts.readingInitial.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.readingInitial — translate that key.

AddReceipts.readingCount.source: Reading {total, plural, one {# receipt} other {# receipts}} with AI…
AddReceipts.readingCount.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.readingCount — translate that key.

AddReceipts.readProgress.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.readProgress — translate that key.

AddReceipts.loadFailed.context: Error when the Shoebox listing fails to load.

AddReceipts.uploadFailed.context: Auto-copied from Shoebox.uploadFailed — translate that key.

AddReceipts.addFailed.context: Error when adding the receipts to the claim fails.

AddReceipts.endedUnexpectedly.context: Error when the progress stream ends without a result.

AddReceipts.confirmReading.context: Primary button while extraction runs. Keep the ellipsis.

AddReceipts.confirmCount.source: ✨ Add {count, plural, one {# receipt} other {# receipts}}
AddReceipts.confirmCount.context: Primary button with a selection (ICU count); keep the ✨.

AddReceipts.confirm.context: Primary button with no selection yet; keep the ✨.
